examples: I felt so awkward at the party.

context: So that person might feel a little bit awkward or uncomfortable or even less doubt.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.

context: Definitely, I think big cities in general are kind of related to the rat race because many people move to the big city to pursue something.

examples: How do you pronounce this word?
